# MyPulseScan Health — Enterprise Clinical Intelligence

## About
MyPulseScan Health is a clinical intelligence platform for multi-location medical practices, PE-backed MSOs, and enterprise health networks. It aggregates patient health records from CommonWell, Carequality, TEFCA, and Surescripts at the point of care — no forms, no faxing.

## Core Capabilities
- Multi-network patient record aggregation (320M+ US patients)
- Real pharmacy fill history via Surescripts
- Patient match confidence scoring (Verato MPI)
- Direct EMR push via Redox (Epic, Athena, eClinicalWorks, Cerner)
- HIPAA-compliant audit trail on every pull
- RPM billing automation (CPT 99453, 99454, 99457)

## Pricing Model
- Pilot: Free, 1 location, 30 days
- Growth: $299/location/month + $0.50/pull over 200/month
- Platform (50+ locations): $299/location/month + 10% of net new RPM billing

## Target Customers
- PE-backed multi-location urgent care chains (5–300 locations)
- MSOs managing primary care, urgent care, or specialty networks
- Enterprise health systems evaluating RPM revenue opportunities

## Contact
